## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Joey (Insight Media Group) and Marcel (GrowthX) to explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Joey leads Insight Media Group, rolling up media companies (1-2 acquisitions/year) for Insight Partners](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Marcel co-founded GrowthX, an AI-powered content creation platform (70 ARR, 45 customers, Series A raised)](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Both expressed interest in potential collaboration, focusing on Towards Data Science as a pilot project](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Discussed leveraging GrowthX's AI workflows to enhance publishing processes for Insight Media Group's properties](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Topics

### Joey's Background and Current Role

  - [Classically trained pianist, transitioned to event production and tech industry](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Worked at TechCrunch, eventually becoming GM](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Now leads Insight Media Group, acquiring and managing media properties for Insight Partners](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Portfolio includes publications, newsletters, and platforms like Roadmap.sh (1.8M users)](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

### Marcel's Journey and GrowthX

  - [Career in content marketing and publishing for tech companies (IBM, HP, HashiCorp)](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Developed AI workflows to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Co-founded GrowthX, offering AI-powered content creation as a service](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Recently raised Series A, growing to 50 people and \~70 ARR](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

### GrowthX Platform Demo

  - [Showed complex AI workflows for content research, planning, and creation](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Demonstrated deep researcher tool and hiring assessment capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [Emphasized the platform's ability to supercharge existing content teams](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Marcel proposed a pilot project, potentially with Towards Data Science](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Joey offered to share data and content at scale in exchange for AI-enhanced publishing processes](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of Marcel engaging as an advisor or consultant](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [Mentioned potential introductions to Insight Partners investment team](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting next week to dive deeper into collaboration possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Joey to involve Ludo (founder of Towards Data Science) in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
  - [Explore pilot project focusing on Towards Data Science (5,400 contributors, contributor model)](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [Marcel to send meeting recording for reference](https://fathom.video/share/B3miwrwqyR11-sXGkVq8QEyfzCdKMMw4?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
